title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: A new supermarket is being built in our area.
example.secondSentence: They (1) _________ a new supermarket in our area.

questions.firstSentence: She has been collecting stamps since she was eight.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ collecting stamps since she was eight.

questions.firstSentence: It's not allowed to use your phone in class.
No river in Europe is longer than the Volga.
He decided to take up yoga last year.
'Don't forget to submit the form,' she said.
Despite working long hours, she stayed cheerful.
questions.secondSentence: She stayed cheerful (1) _________ she worked long hours.
